TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Takay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 162 buwan, 391 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 79 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 312 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 16%, Bunun 2%, Tayan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Takay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Takay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Takay hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Takay hya' ga Mangcelan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Takay ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Takay maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ takaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa maŋʦ~ʨelan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ takaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ takaj maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Takay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 162 buwan, 391 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 79 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 312 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 16%, Bunun 2%, Tayan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Takay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Takay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Takay hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Takay hya' ga Mangcelan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Takay ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Takay maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ takaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na takaj ħjaʔ ɣa maŋʦ~ʨelan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ takaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ takaj maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
